2197 MachineBasicBlock *MBB;
2198
2199 /// Debug info is meaningful and potentially useful here, but we create
2200 /// blocks out of order when they're jumped to, which makes it a bit
2201 /// harder. Let's see if we need it first.
2202 explicit BasicBlockSDNode(MachineBasicBlock *mbb)
2203 : SDNode(ISD::BasicBlock, 0, DebugLoc(), getSDVTList(MVT::Other)), MBB(mbb)
2204 {}
2205
2206public:
2207 MachineBasicBlock *getBasicBlock() const { return MBB; }
2208
2209 static bool classof(const SDNode *N) {
2210 return N->getOpcode() == ISD::BasicBlock;
2211 }
2212};
2213
2214/// A "pseudo-class" with methods for operating on BUILD_VECTORs.
2215class BuildVectorSDNode : public SDNode {
2216public:
2217 // These are constructed as SDNodes and then cast to BuildVectorSDNodes.
2218 explicit BuildVectorSDNode() = delete;
2219
2220 /// Check if this is a constant splat, and if so, find the
2221 /// smallest element size that splats the vector. If MinSplatBits is
2222 /// nonzero, the element size must be at least that large. Note that the
2223 /// splat element may be the entire vector (i.e., a one element vector).
2224 /// Returns the splat element value in SplatValue. Any undefined bits in
2225 /// that value are zero, and the corresponding bits in the SplatUndef mask
2226 /// are set. The SplatBitSize value is set to the splat element size in
2227 /// bits. HasAnyUndefs is set to true if any bits in the vector are
2228 /// undefined. isBigEndian describes the endianness of the target.
2229 LLVM_ABI bool isConstantSplat(APInt &SplatValue, APInt &SplatUndef,
2230 unsigned &SplatBitSize, bool &HasAnyUndefs,
2231 unsigned MinSplatBits = 0,
2232 bool isBigEndian = false) const;
2233
2234 /// Returns the demanded splatted value or a null value if this is not a
2235 /// splat.
2236 ///
2237 /// The DemandedElts mask indicates the elements that must be in the splat.
2238 /// If passed a non-null UndefElements bitvector, it will resize it to match
2239 /// the vector width and set the bits where elements are undef.
2240 LLVM_ABI SDValue getSplatValue(const APInt &DemandedElts,
2241 BitVector *UndefElements = nullptr) const;
2242
2243 /// Returns the splatted value or a null value if this is not a splat.
2244 ///
2245 /// If passed a non-null UndefElements bitvector, it will resize it to match
2246 /// the vector width and set the bits where elements are undef.
2247 LLVM_ABI SDValue getSplatValue(BitVector *UndefElements = nullptr) const;
2248
2249 /// Find the shortest repeating sequence of values in the build vector.
2250 ///
2251 /// e.g. { u, X, u, X, u, u, X, u } -> { X }
2252 /// { X, Y, u, Y, u, u, X, u } -> { X, Y }
2253 ///
2254 /// Currently this must be a power-of-2 build vector.
2255 /// The DemandedElts mask indicates the elements that must be present,
2256 /// undemanded elements in Sequence may be null (SDValue()). If passed a
2257 /// non-null UndefElements bitvector, it will resize it to match the original
2258 /// vector width and set the bits where elements are undef. If result is
2259 /// false, Sequence will be empty.
2260 LLVM_ABI bool getRepeatedSequence(const APInt &DemandedElts,
2261 SmallVectorImpl<SDValue> &Sequence,
2262 BitVector *UndefElements = nullptr) const;
2263
2264 /// Find the shortest repeating sequence of values in the build vector.
2265 ///
2266 /// e.g. { u, X, u, X, u, u, X, u } -> { X }
2267 /// { X, Y, u, Y, u, u, X, u } -> { X, Y }
2268 ///
2269 /// Currently this must be a power-of-2 build vector.
2270 /// If passed a non-null UndefElements bitvector, it will resize it to match
2271 /// the original vector width and set the bits where elements are undef.
2272 /// If result is false, Sequence will be empty.
2273 LLVM_ABI bool getRepeatedSequence(SmallVectorImpl<SDValue> &Sequence,
2274 BitVector *UndefElements = nullptr) const;
2275
2276 /// Returns the demanded splatted constant or null if this is not a constant
2277 /// splat.
2278 ///
2279 /// The DemandedElts mask indicates the elements that must be in the splat.
2280 /// If passed a non-null UndefElements bitvector, it will resize it to match
2281 /// the vector width and set the bits where elements are undef.
2282 LLVM_ABI ConstantSDNode *
2283 getConstantSplatNode(const APInt &DemandedElts,
2284 BitVector *UndefElements = nullptr) const;
2285
2286 /// Returns the splatted constant or null if this is not a constant
2287 /// splat.
2288 ///
2289 /// If passed a non-null UndefElements bitvector, it will resize it to match
2290 /// the vector width and set the bits where elements are undef.
2291 LLVM_ABI ConstantSDNode *
2292 getConstantSplatNode(BitVector *UndefElements = nullptr) const;
2293
2294 /// Returns the demanded splatted constant FP or null if this is not a
2295 /// constant FP splat.
2296 ///
2297 /// The DemandedElts mask indicates the elements that must be in the splat.
2298 /// If passed a non-null UndefElements bitvector, it will resize it to match
2299 /// the vector width and set the bits where elements are undef.
2300 LLVM_ABI ConstantFPSDNode *
2301 getConstantFPSplatNode(const APInt &DemandedElts,
2302 BitVector *UndefElements = nullptr) const;
2303
2304 /// Returns the splatted constant FP or null if this is not a constant
2305 /// FP splat.
2306 ///
2307 /// If passed a non-null UndefElements bitvector, it will resize it to match
2308 /// the vector width and set the bits where elements are undef.
2309 LLVM_ABI ConstantFPSDNode *
2310 getConstantFPSplatNode(BitVector *UndefElements = nullptr) const;
2311
2312 /// If this is a constant FP splat and the splatted constant FP is an
2313 /// exact power or 2, return the log base 2 integer value. Otherwise,
2314 /// return -1.
2315 ///
2316 /// The BitWidth specifies the necessary bit precision.
2317 LLVM_ABI int32_t getConstantFPSplatPow2ToLog2Int(BitVector *UndefElements,
2318 uint32_t BitWidth) const;
2319
2320 /// Extract the raw bit data from a build vector of Undef, Constant or
2321 /// ConstantFP node elements. Each raw bit element will be \p
2322 /// DstEltSizeInBits wide, undef elements are treated as zero, and entirely
2323 /// undefined elements are flagged in \p UndefElements.
2324 LLVM_ABI bool getConstantRawBits(bool IsLittleEndian,
2325 unsigned DstEltSizeInBits,
2326 SmallVectorImpl<APInt> &RawBitElements,
2327 BitVector &UndefElements) const;
2328
2329 LLVM_ABI bool isConstant() const;
2330
2331 /// If this BuildVector is constant and represents the numerical series
2332 /// "<a, a+n, a+2n, a+3n, ...>" where a is integer and n is a non-zero integer,
2333 /// the value "<a,n>" is returned.
2334 LLVM_ABI std::optional<std::pair<APInt, APInt>> isConstantSequence() const;
2335
2336 /// Recast bit data \p SrcBitElements to \p DstEltSizeInBits wide elements.
2337 /// Undef elements are treated as zero, and entirely undefined elements are
2338 /// flagged in \p DstUndefElements.
2339 LLVM_ABI static void recastRawBits(bool IsLittleEndian,
2340 unsigned DstEltSizeInBits,
2341 SmallVectorImpl<APInt> &DstBitElements,
2342 ArrayRef<APInt> SrcBitElements,
2343 BitVector &DstUndefElements,
2344 const BitVector &SrcUndefElements);
2345
2346 static bool classof(const SDNode *N) {
2347 return N->getOpcode() == ISD::BUILD_VECTOR;
2348 }
2349};
2350
2351/// An SDNode that holds an arbitrary LLVM IR Value. This is
2352/// used when the SelectionDAG needs to make a simple reference to something
2353/// in the LLVM IR representation.
2354///
2355class SrcValueSDNode : public SDNode {
2356 friend class SelectionDAG;
2357
2358 const Value *V;
2359
2360 /// Create a SrcValue for a general value.
2361 explicit SrcValueSDNode(const Value *v)
2362 : SDNode(ISD::SRCVALUE, 0, DebugLoc(), getSDVTList(MVT::Other)), V(v) {}
2363
2364public:
2365 /// Return the contained Value.
2366 const Value *getValue() const { return V; }
2367
2368 static bool classof(const SDNode *N) {
2369 return N->getOpcode() == ISD::SRCVALUE;
2370 }
2371};
2372
2373class MDNodeSDNode : public SDNode {
2374 friend class SelectionDAG;
2375
2376 const MDNode *MD;
2377
2378 explicit MDNodeSDNode(const MDNode *md)
2379 : SDNode(ISD::MDNODE_SDNODE, 0, DebugLoc(), getSDVTList(MVT::Other)), MD(md)
2380 {}
2381
2382public:
2383 const MDNode *getMD() const { return MD; }
2384
2385 static bool classof(const SDNode *N) {
2386 return N->getOpcode() == ISD::MDNODE_SDNODE;
2387 }
2388};
2389
2390class RegisterSDNode : public SDNode {
2391 friend class SelectionDAG;
2392
2393 Register Reg;
2394
2395 RegisterSDNode(Register reg, SDVTList VTs)
2396 : SDNode(ISD::Register, 0, DebugLoc(), VTs), Reg(reg) {}
2397
2398public:
2399 Register getReg() const { return Reg; }
2400
2401 static bool classof(const SDNode *N) {
2402 return N->getOpcode() == ISD::Register;
2403 }
2404};
2405
2406class RegisterMaskSDNode : public SDNode {
2407 friend class SelectionDAG;
2408
2409 // The memory for RegMask is not owned by the node.
2410 const uint32_t *RegMask;
2411
2412 RegisterMaskSDNode(const uint32_t *mask)
2413 : SDNode(ISD::RegisterMask, 0, DebugLoc(), getSDVTList(MVT::Untyped)),
2414 RegMask(mask) {}
2415
2416public:
2417 const uint32_t *getRegMask() const { return RegMask; }
2418
2419 static bool classof(const SDNode *N) {
2420 return N->getOpcode() == ISD::RegisterMask;
2421 }
2422};
2423
2424class BlockAddressSDNode : public SDNode {
2425 friend class SelectionDAG;
2426
2427 const BlockAddress *BA;
2428 int64_t Offset;
2429 unsigned TargetFlags;
2430
2431 BlockAddressSDNode(unsigned NodeTy, SDVTList VTs, const BlockAddress *ba,
2432 int64_t o, unsigned Flags)
2433 : SDNode(NodeTy, 0, DebugLoc(), VTs), BA(ba), Offset(o),
2434 TargetFlags(Flags) {}
2435
2436public:
2437 const BlockAddress *getBlockAddress() const { return BA; }
2438 int64_t getOffset() const { return Offset; }
2439 unsigned getTargetFlags() const { return TargetFlags; }
2440
2441 static bool classof(const SDNode *N) {
2442 return N->getOpcode() == ISD::BlockAddress ||
2443 N->getOpcode() == ISD::TargetBlockAddress;
2444 }
2445};
2446
2447class LabelSDNode : public SDNode {
2448 friend class SelectionDAG;
2449
2450 MCSymbol *Label;
2451
2452 LabelSDNode(unsigned Opcode, unsigned Order, const DebugLoc &dl, MCSymbol *L)
2453 : SDNode(Opcode, Order, dl, getSDVTList(MVT::Other)), Label(L) {
2454 assert(LabelSDNode::classof(this) && "not a label opcode");
2455 }
2456
2457public:
2458 MCSymbol *getLabel() const { return Label; }
2459
2460 static bool classof(const SDNode *N) {
2461 return N->getOpcode() == ISD::EH_LABEL ||
2462 N->getOpcode() == ISD::ANNOTATION_LABEL;
2463 }
2464};
2465
2466class ExternalSymbolSDNode : public SDNode {
2467 friend class SelectionDAG;
2468
2469 const char *Symbol;
2470 unsigned TargetFlags;
2471
2472 ExternalSymbolSDNode(bool isTarget, const char *Sym, unsigned TF,
2473 SDVTList VTs)
2474 : SDNode(isTarget ? ISD::TargetExternalSymbol : ISD::ExternalSymbol, 0,
2475 DebugLoc(), VTs),
2476 Symbol(Sym), TargetFlags(TF) {}
2477
2478public:
2479 const char *getSymbol() const { return Symbol; }
2480 unsigned getTargetFlags() const { return TargetFlags; }
2481
2482 static bool classof(const SDNode *N) {
2483 return N->getOpcode() == ISD::ExternalSymbol ||
2484 N->getOpcode() == ISD::TargetExternalSymbol;
2485 }
2486};
2487
2488class MCSymbolSDNode : public SDNode {
2489 friend class SelectionDAG;
2490
2491 MCSymbol *Symbol;
2492
2493 MCSymbolSDNode(MCSymbol *Symbol, SDVTList VTs)
2494 : SDNode(ISD::MCSymbol, 0, DebugLoc(), VTs), Symbol(Symbol) {}
2495
2496public:
2497 MCSymbol *getMCSymbol() const { return Symbol; }
2498
2499 static bool classof(const SDNode *N) {
2500 return N->getOpcode() == ISD::MCSymbol;
2501 }
2502};
2503
2504class CondCodeSDNode : public SDNode {
2505 friend class SelectionDAG;
2506
2507 ISD::CondCode Condition;
2508
2509 explicit CondCodeSDNode(ISD::CondCode Cond)
2510 : SDNode(ISD::CONDCODE, 0, DebugLoc(), getSDVTList(MVT::Other)),
2511 Condition(Cond) {}
2512
2513public:
2514 ISD::CondCode get() const { return Condition; }
2515
2516 static bool classof(const SDNode *N) {
2517 return N->getOpcode() == ISD::CONDCODE;
2518 }
2519};
2520
2521/// This class is used to represent EVT's, which are used
2522/// to parameterize some operations.
2523class VTSDNode : public SDNode {
2524 friend class SelectionDAG;
2525
2526 EVT ValueType;
2527
2528 explicit VTSDNode(EVT VT)
2529 : SDNode(ISD::VALUETYPE, 0, DebugLoc(), getSDVTList(MVT::Other)),
2530 ValueType(VT) {}
2531
2532public:
2533 EVT getVT() const { return ValueType; }
2534
2535 static bool classof(const SDNode *N) {
2536 return N->getOpcode() == ISD::VALUETYPE;
2537 }
2538};
2539
2540/// Base class for LoadSDNode and StoreSDNode
2541class LSBaseSDNode : public MemSDNode {
2542public:
2543 LSBaseSDNode(ISD::NodeType NodeTy, unsigned Order, const DebugLoc &dl,
2544 SDVTList VTs, ISD::MemIndexedMode AM, EVT MemVT,
2545 MachineMemOperand *MMO)
2546 : MemSDNode(NodeTy, Order, dl, VTs, MemVT, MMO) {
2547 LSBaseSDNodeBits.AddressingMode = AM;
2548 assert(getAddressingMode() == AM && "Value truncated");
2549 }
2550
2551 const SDValue &getOffset() const {
2552 return getOperand(getOpcode() == ISD::LOAD ? 2 : 3);
2553 }
2554
2555 /// Return the addressing mode for this load or store:
2556 /// unindexed, pre-inc, pre-dec, post-inc, or post-dec.
2557 ISD::MemIndexedMode getAddressingMode() const {
2558 return static_cast<ISD::MemIndexedMode>(LSBaseSDNodeBits.AddressingMode);
2559 }
2560
2561 /// Return true if this is a pre/post inc/dec load/store.
2562 bool isIndexed() const { return getAddressingMode() != ISD::UNINDEXED; }
2563
2564 /// Return true if this is NOT a pre/post inc/dec load/store.
2565 bool isUnindexed() const { return getAddressingMode() == ISD::UNINDEXED; }
2566
2567 static bool classof(const SDNode *N) {
2568 return N->getOpcode() == ISD::LOAD ||
2569 N->getOpcode() == ISD::STORE;
2570 }
2571};
2572
2573/// This class is used to represent ISD::LOAD nodes.
2574class LoadSDNode : public LSBaseSDNode {
2575 friend class SelectionDAG;
2576
2577 LoadSDNode(unsigned Order, const DebugLoc &dl, SDVTList VTs,
2578 ISD::MemIndexedMode AM, ISD::LoadExtType ETy, EVT MemVT,
2579 MachineMemOperand *MMO)
2580 : LSBaseSDNode(ISD::LOAD, Order, dl, VTs, AM, MemVT, MMO) {
2581 LoadSDNodeBits.ExtTy = ETy;
2582 assert(readMem() && "Load MachineMemOperand is not a load!");
2583 assert(!writeMem() && "Load MachineMemOperand is a store!");
2584 }
2585
2586public:
2587 /// Return whether this is a plain node,
2588 /// or one of the varieties of value-extending loads.
2589 ISD::LoadExtType getExtensionType() const {
2590 return static_cast<ISD::LoadExtType>(LoadSDNodeBits.ExtTy);
2591 }
2592
2593 const SDValue &getBasePtr() const { return getOperand(1); }
2594 const SDValue &getOffset() const { return getOperand(2); }
2595
2596 static bool classof(const SDNode *N) {
2597 return N->getOpcode() == ISD::LOAD;
2598 }
2599};
2600
2601/// This class is used to represent ISD::STORE nodes.
2602class StoreSDNode : public LSBaseSDNode {
2603 friend class SelectionDAG;
2604
2605 StoreSDNode(unsigned Order, const DebugLoc &dl, SDVTList VTs,
2606 ISD::MemIndexedMode AM, bool isTrunc, EVT MemVT,
2607 MachineMemOperand *MMO)
2608 : LSBaseSDNode(ISD::STORE, Order, dl, VTs, AM, MemVT, MMO) {
2609 StoreSDNodeBits.IsTruncating = isTrunc;
2610 assert(!readMem() && "Store MachineMemOperand is a load!");
2611 assert(writeMem() && "Store MachineMemOperand is not a store!");
2612 }
2613
2614public:
2615 /// Return true if the op does a truncation before store.
2616 /// For integers this is the same as doing a TRUNCATE and storing the result.
2617 /// For floats, it is the same as doing an FP_ROUND and storing the result.
2618 bool isTruncatingStore() const { return StoreSDNodeBits.IsTruncating; }
2619
2620 const SDValue &getValue() const { return getOperand(1); }
2621 const SDValue &getBasePtr() const { return getOperand(2); }
2622 const SDValue &getOffset() const { return getOperand(3); }
2623
2624 static bool classof(const SDNode *N) {
2625 return N->getOpcode() == ISD::STORE;
2626 }
2627};
2628
2629/// This base class is used to represent VP_LOAD, VP_STORE,
2630/// EXPERIMENTAL_VP_STRIDED_LOAD and EXPERIMENTAL_VP_STRIDED_STORE nodes
2631class VPBaseLoadStoreSDNode : public MemSDNode {
2632public:
2633 friend class SelectionDAG;
2634
2635 VPBaseLoadStoreSDNode(ISD::NodeType NodeTy, unsigned Order,
2636 const DebugLoc &DL, SDVTList VTs,
2637 ISD::MemIndexedMode AM, EVT MemVT,
2638 MachineMemOperand *MMO)
2639 : MemSDNode(NodeTy, Order, DL, VTs, MemVT, MMO) {
2640 LSBaseSDNodeBits.AddressingMode = AM;
2641 assert(getAddressingMode() == AM && "Value truncated");
2642 }
2643
2644 // VPStridedStoreSDNode (Chain, Data, Ptr, Offset, Stride, Mask, EVL)
2645 // VPStoreSDNode (Chain, Data, Ptr, Offset, Mask, EVL)
2646 // VPStridedLoadSDNode (Chain, Ptr, Offset, Stride, Mask, EVL)
2647 // VPLoadSDNode (Chain, Ptr, Offset, Mask, EVL)
2648 // Mask is a vector of i1 elements;
2649 // the type of EVL is TLI.getVPExplicitVectorLengthTy().
2650 const SDValue &getOffset() const {
2651 return getOperand((getOpcode() == ISD::EXPERIMENTAL_VP_STRIDED_LOAD ||
2652 getOpcode() == ISD::VP_LOAD)
2653 ? 2
2654 : 3);
2655 }
2656 const SDValue &getBasePtr() const {
2657 return getOperand((getOpcode() == ISD::EXPERIMENTAL_VP_STRIDED_LOAD ||
2658 getOpcode() == ISD::VP_LOAD)
2659 ? 1
2660 : 2);
2661 }
2662 const SDValue &getMask() const {
2663 switch (getOpcode()) {
2664 default:
2665 llvm_unreachable("Invalid opcode");
2666 case ISD::VP_LOAD:
2667 return getOperand(3);
2668 case ISD::VP_STORE:
2669 case ISD::EXPERIMENTAL_VP_STRIDED_LOAD:
2670 return getOperand(4);
2671 case ISD::EXPERIMENTAL_VP_STRIDED_STORE:
2672 return getOperand(5);
2673 }
2674 }
2675 const SDValue &getVectorLength() const {
2676 switch (getOpcode()) {
2677 default:
2678 llvm_unreachable("Invalid opcode");
2679 case ISD::VP_LOAD:
2680 return getOperand(4);
2681 case ISD::VP_STORE:
2682 case ISD::EXPERIMENTAL_VP_STRIDED_LOAD:
2683 return getOperand(5);
2684 case ISD::EXPERIMENTAL_VP_STRIDED_STORE:
2685 return getOperand(6);
2686 }
2687 }
2688
2689 /// Return the addressing mode for this load or store:
2690 /// unindexed, pre-inc, pre-dec, post-inc, or post-dec.
2691 ISD::MemIndexedMode getAddressingMode() const {
2692 return static_cast<ISD::MemIndexedMode>(LSBaseSDNodeBits.AddressingMode);
2693 }
2694
2695 /// Return true if this is a pre/post inc/dec load/store.
2696 bool isIndexed() const { return getAddressingMode() != ISD::UNINDEXED; }
2697
2698 /// Return true if this is NOT a pre/post inc/dec load/store.
2699 bool isUnindexed() const { return getAddressingMode() == ISD::UNINDEXED; }
2700
2701 static bool classof(const SDNode *N) {
2702 return N->getOpcode() == ISD::EXPERIMENTAL_VP_STRIDED_LOAD ||
2703 N->getOpcode() == ISD::EXPERIMENTAL_VP_STRIDED_STORE ||
2704 N->getOpcode() == ISD::VP_LOAD || N->getOpcode() == ISD::VP_STORE;
2705 }
2706};
2707
2708/// This class is used to represent a VP_LOAD node
2709class VPLoadSDNode : public VPBaseLoadStoreSDNode {
2710public:
2711 friend class SelectionDAG;
2712
2713 VPLoadSDNode(unsigned Order, const DebugLoc &dl, SDVTList VTs,
2714 ISD::MemIndexedMode AM, ISD::LoadExtType ETy, bool isExpanding,
2715 EVT MemVT, MachineMemOperand *MMO)
2716 : VPBaseLoadStoreSDNode(ISD::VP_LOAD, Order, dl, VTs, AM, MemVT, MMO) {
2717 LoadSDNodeBits.ExtTy = ETy;
2718 LoadSDNodeBits.IsExpanding = isExpanding;
2719 }
2720
2721 ISD::LoadExtType getExtensionType() const {
2722 return static_cast<ISD::LoadExtType>(LoadSDNodeBits.ExtTy);
2723 }
2724
2725 const SDValue &getBasePtr() const { return getOperand(1); }
2726 const SDValue &getOffset() const { return getOperand(2); }
2727 const SDValue &getMask() const { return getOperand(3); }
2728 const SDValue &getVectorLength() const { return getOperand(4); }
2729
2730 static bool classof(const SDNode *N) {
2731 return N->getOpcode() == ISD::VP_LOAD;
2732 }
2733 bool isExpandingLoad() const { return LoadSDNodeBits.IsExpanding; }
2734};
2735
2736/// This class is used to represent an EXPERIMENTAL_VP_STRIDED_LOAD node.
2737class VPStridedLoadSDNode : public VPBaseLoadStoreSDNode {
2738public:
2739 friend class SelectionDAG;
2740
2741 VPStridedLoadSDNode(unsigned Order, const DebugLoc &DL, SDVTList VTs,
2742 ISD::MemIndexedMode AM, ISD::LoadExtType ETy,
2743 bool IsExpanding, EVT MemVT, MachineMemOperand *MMO)
2744 : VPBaseLoadStoreSDNode(ISD::EXPERIMENTAL_VP_STRIDED_LOAD, Order, DL, VTs,
2745 AM, MemVT, MMO) {
2746 LoadSDNodeBits.ExtTy = ETy;
2747 LoadSDNodeBits.IsExpanding = IsExpanding;
2748 }
2749
2750 ISD::LoadExtType getExtensionType() const {
2751 return static_cast<ISD::LoadExtType>(LoadSDNodeBits.ExtTy);
2752 }
2753
2754 const SDValue &getBasePtr() const { return getOperand(1); }
2755 const SDValue &getOffset() const { return getOperand(2); }
2756 const SDValue &getStride() const { return getOperand(3); }
2757 const SDValue &getMask() const { return getOperand(4); }
2758 const SDValue &getVectorLength() const { return getOperand(5); }
2759
2760 static bool classof(const SDNode *N) {
2761 return N->getOpcode() == ISD::EXPERIMENTAL_VP_STRIDED_LOAD;
2762 }
2763 bool isExpandingLoad() const { return LoadSDNodeBits.IsExpanding; }
2764};
2765
2766/// This class is used to represent a VP_STORE node
2767class VPStoreSDNode : public VPBaseLoadStoreSDNode {
2768public:
2769 friend class SelectionDAG;
2770
2771 VPStoreSDNode(unsigned Order, const DebugLoc &dl, SDVTList VTs,
2772 ISD::MemIndexedMode AM, bool isTrunc, bool isCompressing,
2773 EVT MemVT, MachineMemOperand *MMO)
2774 : VPBaseLoadStoreSDNode(ISD::VP_STORE, Order, dl, VTs, AM, MemVT, MMO) {
2775 StoreSDNodeBits.IsTruncating = isTrunc;
2776 StoreSDNodeBits.IsCompressing = isCompressing;
2777 }
2778
2779 /// Return true if this is a truncating store.
2780 /// For integers this is the same as doing a TRUNCATE and storing the result.
2781 /// For floats, it is the same as doing an FP_ROUND and storing the result.
2782 bool isTruncatingStore() const { return StoreSDNodeBits.IsTruncating; }
2783
2784 /// Returns true if the op does a compression to the vector before storing.
2785 /// The node contiguously stores the active elements (integers or floats)
2786 /// in src (those with their respective bit set in writemask k) to unaligned
2787 /// memory at base_addr.
2788 bool isCompressingStore() const { return StoreSDNodeBits.IsCompressing; }
2789
2790 const SDValue &getValue() const { return getOperand(1); }
2791 const SDValue &getBasePtr() const { return getOperand(2); }
2792 const SDValue &getOffset() const { return getOperand(3); }
2793 const SDValue &getMask() const { return getOperand(4); }
2794 const SDValue &getVectorLength() const { return getOperand(5); }
2795
2796 static bool classof(const SDNode *N) {
2797 return N->getOpcode() == ISD::VP_STORE;
2798 }
2799};
2800
2801/// This class is used to represent an EXPERIMENTAL_VP_STRIDED_STORE node.
2802class VPStridedStoreSDNode : public VPBaseLoadStoreSDNode {
2803public:
2804 friend class SelectionDAG;
2805
2806 VPStridedStoreSDNode(unsigned Order, const DebugLoc &DL, SDVTList VTs,
2807 ISD::MemIndexedMode AM, bool IsTrunc, bool IsCompressing,
2808 EVT MemVT, MachineMemOperand *MMO)
2809 : VPBaseLoadStoreSDNode(ISD::EXPERIMENTAL_VP_STRIDED_STORE, Order, DL,
2810 VTs, AM, MemVT, MMO) {
2811 StoreSDNodeBits.IsTruncating = IsTrunc;
2812 StoreSDNodeBits.IsCompressing = IsCompressing;
2813 }
2814
2815 /// Return true if this is a truncating store.
2816 /// For integers this is the same as doing a TRUNCATE and storing the result.
2817 /// For floats, it is the same as doing an FP_ROUND and storing the result.
2818 bool isTruncatingStore() const { return StoreSDNodeBits.IsTruncating; }
2819
2820 /// Returns true if the op does a compression to the vector before storing.
2821 /// The node contiguously stores the active elements (integers or floats)
2822 /// in src (those with their respective bit set in writemask k) to unaligned
2823 /// memory at base_addr.
2824 bool isCompressingStore() const { return StoreSDNodeBits.IsCompressing; }
2825
2826 const SDValue &getValue() const { return getOperand(1); }
2827 const SDValue &getBasePtr() const { return getOperand(2); }
2828 const SDValue &getOffset() const { return getOperand(3); }
2829 const SDValue &getStride() const { return getOperand(4); }
2830 const SDValue &getMask() const { return getOperand(5); }
2831 const SDValue &getVectorLength() const { return getOperand(6); }
2832
2833 static bool classof(const SDNode *N) {
2834 return N->getOpcode() == ISD::EXPERIMENTAL_VP_STRIDED_STORE;
2835 }
2836};
2837
2838/// This base class is used to represent MLOAD and MSTORE nodes
2839class MaskedLoadStoreSDNode : public MemSDNode {
2840public:
2841 friend class SelectionDAG;
2842
2843 MaskedLoadStoreSDNode(ISD::NodeType NodeTy, unsigned Order,
2844 const DebugLoc &dl, SDVTList VTs,
2845 ISD::MemIndexedMode AM, EVT MemVT,
2846 MachineMemOperand *MMO)
2847 : MemSDNode(NodeTy, Order, dl, VTs, MemVT, MMO) {
2848 LSBaseSDNodeBits.AddressingMode = AM;
2849 assert(getAddressingMode() == AM && "Value truncated");
2850 }
2851
2852 // MaskedLoadSDNode (Chain, ptr, offset, mask, passthru)
2853 // MaskedStoreSDNode (Chain, data, ptr, offset, mask)
2854 // Mask is a vector of i1 elements
2855 const SDValue &getOffset() const {
2856 return getOperand(getOpcode() == ISD::MLOAD ? 2 : 3);
2857 }
2858 const SDValue &getMask() const {
2859 return getOperand(getOpcode() == ISD::MLOAD ? 3 : 4);
2860 }
2861
2862 /// Return the addressing mode for this load or store:
2863 /// unindexed, pre-inc, pre-dec, post-inc, or post-dec.
2864 ISD::MemIndexedMode getAddressingMode() const {
2865 return static_cast<ISD::MemIndexedMode>(LSBaseSDNodeBits.AddressingMode);
2866 }
2867
2868 /// Return true if this is a pre/post inc/dec load/store.
2869 bool isIndexed() const { return getAddressingMode() != ISD::UNINDEXED; }
2870
2871 /// Return true if this is NOT a pre/post inc/dec load/store.
2872 bool isUnindexed() const { return getAddressingMode() == ISD::UNINDEXED; }
2873
2874 static bool classof(const SDNode *N) {
2875 return N->getOpcode() == ISD::MLOAD ||
2876 N->getOpcode() == ISD::MSTORE;
2877 }
2878};
2879
2880/// This class is used to represent an MLOAD node
2881class MaskedLoadSDNode : public MaskedLoadStoreSDNode {
2882public:
2883 friend class SelectionDAG;
2884
2885 MaskedLoadSDNode(unsigned Order, const DebugLoc &dl, SDVTList VTs,
2886 ISD::MemIndexedMode AM, ISD::LoadExtType ETy,
2887 bool IsExpanding, EVT MemVT, MachineMemOperand *MMO)
2888 : MaskedLoadStoreSDNode(ISD::MLOAD, Order, dl, VTs, AM, MemVT, MMO) {
2889 LoadSDNodeBits.ExtTy = ETy;
2890 LoadSDNodeBits.IsExpanding = IsExpanding;
2891 }
2892
2893 ISD::LoadExtType getExtensionType() const {
2894 return static_cast<ISD::LoadExtType>(LoadSDNodeBits.ExtTy);
2895 }
2896
2897 const SDValue &getBasePtr() const { return getOperand(1); }
2898 const SDValue &getOffset() const { return getOperand(2); }
2899 const SDValue &getMask() const { return getOperand(3); }
2900 const SDValue &getPassThru() const { return getOperand(4); }
2901
2902 static bool classof(const SDNode *N) {
2903 return N->getOpcode() == ISD::MLOAD;
2904 }
2905
2906 bool isExpandingLoad() const { return LoadSDNodeBits.IsExpanding; }
2907};
2908
2909/// This class is used to represent an MSTORE node
2910class MaskedStoreSDNode : public MaskedLoadStoreSDNode {
2911public:
2912 friend class SelectionDAG;
2913
2914 MaskedStoreSDNode(unsigned Order, const DebugLoc &dl, SDVTList VTs,
2915 ISD::MemIndexedMode AM, bool isTrunc, bool isCompressing,
2916 EVT MemVT, MachineMemOperand *MMO)
2917 : MaskedLoadStoreSDNode(ISD::MSTORE, Order, dl, VTs, AM, MemVT, MMO) {
2918 StoreSDNodeBits.IsTruncating = isTrunc;
2919 StoreSDNodeBits.IsCompressing = isCompressing;
2920 }
2921
2922 /// Return true if the op does a truncation before store.
2923 /// For integers this is the same as doing a TRUNCATE and storing the result.
2924 /// For floats, it is the same as doing an FP_ROUND and storing the result.
2925 bool isTruncatingStore() const { return StoreSDNodeBits.IsTruncating; }
2926
2927 /// Returns true if the op does a compression to the vector before storing.
2928 /// The node contiguously stores the active elements (integers or floats)
2929 /// in src (those with their respective bit set in writemask k) to unaligned
2930 /// memory at base_addr.
2931 bool isCompressingStore() const { return StoreSDNodeBits.IsCompressing; }
2932
2933 const SDValue &getValue() const { return getOperand(1); }
2934 const SDValue &getBasePtr() const { return getOperand(2); }
2935 const SDValue &getOffset() const { return getOperand(3); }
2936 const SDValue &getMask() const { return getOperand(4); }
2937
2938 static bool classof(const SDNode *N) {
2939 return N->getOpcode() == ISD::MSTORE;
2940 }
2941};
2942
2943/// This is a base class used to represent
2944/// VP_GATHER and VP_SCATTER nodes
2945///
2946class VPGatherScatterSDNode : public MemSDNode {
2947public:
2948 friend class SelectionDAG;
2949
2950 VPGatherScatterSDNode(ISD::NodeType NodeTy, unsigned Order,
2951 const DebugLoc &dl, SDVTList VTs, EVT MemVT,
2952 MachineMemOperand *MMO, ISD::MemIndexType IndexType)
2953 : MemSDNode(NodeTy, Order, dl, VTs, MemVT, MMO) {
2954 LSBaseSDNodeBits.AddressingMode = IndexType;
2955 assert(getIndexType() == IndexType && "Value truncated");
2956 }
2957
2958 /// How is Index applied to BasePtr when computing addresses.
2959 ISD::MemIndexType getIndexType() const {
2960 return static_cast<ISD::MemIndexType>(LSBaseSDNodeBits.AddressingMode);
2961 }
2962 bool isIndexScaled() const {
2963 return !cast<ConstantSDNode>(getScale())->isOne();
2964 }
2965 bool isIndexSigned() const { return isIndexTypeSigned(getIndexType()); }
2966
2967 // In the both nodes address is Op1, mask is Op2:
2968 // VPGatherSDNode (Chain, base, index, scale, mask, vlen)
2969 // VPScatterSDNode (Chain, value, base, index, scale, mask, vlen)
2970 // Mask is a vector of i1 elements
2971 const SDValue &getBasePtr() const {
2972 return getOperand((getOpcode() == ISD::VP_GATHER) ? 1 : 2);
2973 }
2974 const SDValue &getIndex() const {
2975 return getOperand((getOpcode() == ISD::VP_GATHER) ? 2 : 3);
2976 }
2977 const SDValue &getScale() const {
2978 return getOperand((getOpcode() == ISD::VP_GATHER) ? 3 : 4);
2979 }
2980 const SDValue &getMask() const {
2981 return getOperand((getOpcode() == ISD::VP_GATHER) ? 4 : 5);
2982 }
2983 const SDValue &getVectorLength() const {
2984 return getOperand((getOpcode() == ISD::VP_GATHER) ? 5 : 6);
2985 }
2986
2987 static bool classof(const SDNode *N) {
2988 return N->getOpcode() == ISD::VP_GATHER ||
2989 N->getOpcode() == ISD::VP_SCATTER;
2990 }
2991};
2992
2993/// This class is used to represent an VP_GATHER node
2994///
2995class VPGatherSDNode : public VPGatherScatterSDNode {
2996public:
2997 friend class SelectionDAG;
2998
2999 VPGatherSDNode(unsigned Order, const DebugLoc &dl, SDVTList VTs, EVT MemVT,
3000 MachineMemOperand *MMO, ISD::MemIndexType IndexType)
3001 : VPGatherScatterSDNode(ISD::VP_GATHER, Order, dl, VTs, MemVT, MMO,
3002 IndexType) {}
3003
3004 static bool classof(const SDNode *N) {
3005 return N->getOpcode() == ISD::VP_GATHER;
3006 }
3007};
3008
3009/// This class is used to represent an VP_SCATTER node
3010///
3011class VPScatterSDNode : public VPGatherScatterSDNode {
3012public:
3013 friend class SelectionDAG;
3014
3015 VPScatterSDNode(unsigned Order, const DebugLoc &dl, SDVTList VTs, EVT MemVT,
3016 MachineMemOperand *MMO, ISD::MemIndexType IndexType)
3017 : VPGatherScatterSDNode(ISD::VP_SCATTER, Order, dl, VTs, MemVT, MMO,
3018 IndexType) {}
3019
3020 const SDValue &getValue() const { return getOperand(1); }
3021
3022 static bool classof(const SDNode *N) {
3023 return N->getOpcode() == ISD::VP_SCATTER;
3024 }
3025};
3026
3027/// This is a base class used to represent
3028/// MGATHER and MSCATTER nodes
3029///
3030class MaskedGatherScatterSDNode : public MemSDNode {
3031public:
3032 friend class SelectionDAG;
3033
3034 MaskedGatherScatterSDNode(ISD::NodeType NodeTy, unsigned Order,
3035 const DebugLoc &dl, SDVTList VTs, EVT MemVT,
3036 MachineMemOperand *MMO, ISD::MemIndexType IndexType)
3037 : MemSDNode(NodeTy, Order, dl, VTs, MemVT, MMO) {
3038 LSBaseSDNodeBits.AddressingMode = IndexType;
3039 assert(getIndexType() == IndexType && "Value truncated");
3040 }
3041
3042 /// How is Index applied to BasePtr when computing addresses.
3043 ISD::MemIndexType getIndexType() const {
3044 return static_cast<ISD::MemIndexType>(LSBaseSDNodeBits.AddressingMode);
3045 }
3046 bool isIndexScaled() const {
3047 return !cast<ConstantSDNode>(getScale())->isOne();
3048 }
3049 bool isIndexSigned() const { return isIndexTypeSigned(getIndexType()); }
3050
3051 // In the both nodes address is Op1, mask is Op2:
3052 // MaskedGatherSDNode (Chain, passthru, mask, base, index, scale)
3053 // MaskedScatterSDNode (Chain, value, mask, base, index, scale)
3054 // Mask is a vector of i1 elements
3055 const SDValue &getBasePtr() const { return getOperand(3); }
3056 const SDValue &getIndex() const { return getOperand(4); }
3057 const SDValue &getMask() const { return getOperand(2); }
3058 const SDValue &getScale() const { return getOperand(5); }
3059
3060 static bool classof(const SDNode *N) {
3061 return N->getOpcode() == ISD::MGATHER || N->getOpcode() == ISD::MSCATTER ||
3062 N->getOpcode() == ISD::EXPERIMENTAL_VECTOR_HISTOGRAM;
3063 }
3064};
3065
3066/// This class is used to represent an MGATHER node
3067///
3068class MaskedGatherSDNode : public MaskedGatherScatterSDNode {
3069public:
3070 friend class SelectionDAG;
3071
3072 MaskedGatherSDNode(unsigned Order, const DebugLoc &dl, SDVTList VTs,
3073 EVT MemVT, MachineMemOperand *MMO,
3074 ISD::MemIndexType IndexType, ISD::LoadExtType ETy)
3075 : MaskedGatherScatterSDNode(ISD::MGATHER, Order, dl, VTs, MemVT, MMO,
3076 IndexType) {
3077 LoadSDNodeBits.ExtTy = ETy;
3078 }
3079
3080 const SDValue &getPassThru() const { return getOperand(1); }
3081
3082 ISD::LoadExtType getExtensionType() const {
3083 return ISD::LoadExtType(LoadSDNodeBits.ExtTy);
3084 }
3085
3086 static bool classof(const SDNode *N) {
3087 return N->getOpcode() == ISD::MGATHER;
3088 }
3089};
3090
3091/// This class is used to represent an MSCATTER node
3092///
3093class MaskedScatterSDNode : public MaskedGatherScatterSDNode {
3094public:
3095 friend class SelectionDAG;
3096
3097 MaskedScatterSDNode(unsigned Order, const DebugLoc &dl, SDVTList VTs,
3098 EVT MemVT, MachineMemOperand *MMO,
3099 ISD::MemIndexType IndexType, bool IsTrunc)
3100 : MaskedGatherScatterSDNode(ISD::MSCATTER, Order, dl, VTs, MemVT, MMO,
3101 IndexType) {
3102 StoreSDNodeBits.IsTruncating = IsTrunc;
3103 }
3104
3105 /// Return true if the op does a truncation before store.
3106 /// For integers this is the same as doing a TRUNCATE and storing the result.
3107 /// For floats, it is the same as doing an FP_ROUND and storing the result.
3108 bool isTruncatingStore() const { return StoreSDNodeBits.IsTruncating; }
3109
3110 const SDValue &getValue() const { return getOperand(1); }
3111
3112 static bool classof(const SDNode *N) {
3113 return N->getOpcode() == ISD::MSCATTER;
3114 }
3115};
3116
3117class MaskedHistogramSDNode : public MaskedGatherScatterSDNode {
3118public:
3119 friend class SelectionDAG;
3120
3121 MaskedHistogramSDNode(unsigned Order, const DebugLoc &DL, SDVTList VTs,
3122 EVT MemVT, MachineMemOperand *MMO,
3123 ISD::MemIndexType IndexType)
3124 : MaskedGatherScatterSDNode(ISD::EXPERIMENTAL_VECTOR_HISTOGRAM, Order, DL,
3125 VTs, MemVT, MMO, IndexType) {}
3126
3127 ISD::MemIndexType getIndexType() const {
3128 return static_cast<ISD::MemIndexType>(LSBaseSDNodeBits.AddressingMode);
3129 }
3130
3131 const SDValue &getBasePtr() const { return getOperand(3); }
3132 const SDValue &getIndex() const { return getOperand(4); }
3133 const SDValue &getMask() const { return getOperand(2); }
3134 const SDValue &getScale() const { return getOperand(5); }
3135 const SDValue &getInc() const { return getOperand(1); }
3136 const SDValue &getIntID() const { return getOperand(6); }
3137
3138 static bool classof(const SDNode *N) {
3139 return N->getOpcode() == ISD::EXPERIMENTAL_VECTOR_HISTOGRAM;
3140 }
3141};
3142
3143class VPLoadFFSDNode : public MemSDNode {
3144public:
3145 friend class SelectionDAG;
3146
3147 VPLoadFFSDNode(unsigned Order, const DebugLoc &DL, SDVTList VTs, EVT MemVT,
3148 MachineMemOperand *MMO)
3149 : MemSDNode(ISD::VP_LOAD_FF, Order, DL, VTs, MemVT, MMO) {}
3150
3151 const SDValue &getBasePtr() const { return getOperand(1); }
3152 const SDValue &getMask() const { return getOperand(2); }
3153 const SDValue &getVectorLength() const { return getOperand(3); }
3154
3155 static bool classof(const SDNode *N) {
3156 return N->getOpcode() == ISD::VP_LOAD_FF;
3157 }
3158};
3159
3160class FPStateAccessSDNode : public MemSDNode {
3161public:
3162 friend class SelectionDAG;
3163
3164 FPStateAccessSDNode(unsigned NodeTy, unsigned Order, const DebugLoc &dl,
3165 SDVTList VTs, EVT MemVT, MachineMemOperand *MMO)
3166 : MemSDNode(NodeTy, Order, dl, VTs, MemVT, MMO) {
3167 assert((NodeTy == ISD::GET_FPENV_MEM || NodeTy == ISD::SET_FPENV_MEM) &&
3168 "Expected FP state access node");
3169 }
3170
3171 static bool classof(const SDNode *N) {
3172 return N->getOpcode() == ISD::GET_FPENV_MEM ||
3173 N->getOpcode() == ISD::SET_FPENV_MEM;
3174 }
3175};
3176
3177/// An SDNode that represents everything that will be needed
3178/// to construct a MachineInstr. These nodes are created during the
3179/// instruction selection proper phase.
3180///
3181/// Note that the only supported way to set the `memoperands` is by calling the
3182/// `SelectionDAG::setNodeMemRefs` function as the memory management happens
3183/// inside the DAG rather than in the node.
3184class MachineSDNode : public SDNode {
3185private:
3186 friend class SelectionDAG;
3187
3188 MachineSDNode(unsigned Opc, unsigned Order, const DebugLoc &DL, SDVTList VTs)
3189 : SDNode(Opc, Order, DL, VTs) {}
3190
3191 // We use a pointer union between a single `MachineMemOperand` pointer and
3192 // a pointer to an array of `MachineMemOperand` pointers. This is null when
3193 // the number of these is zero, the single pointer variant used when the
3194 // number is one, and the array is used for larger numbers.
3195 //
3196 // The array is allocated via the `SelectionDAG`'s allocator and so will
3197 // always live until the DAG is cleaned up and doesn't require ownership here.
3198 //
3199 // We can't use something simpler like `TinyPtrVector` here because `SDNode`
3200 // subclasses aren't managed in a conforming C++ manner. See the comments on
3201 // `SelectionDAG::MorphNodeTo` which details what all goes on, but the
3202 // constraint here is that these don't manage memory with their constructor or
3203 // destructor and can be initialized to a good state even if they start off
3204 // uninitialized.
3205 PointerUnion<MachineMemOperand *, MachineMemOperand **> MemRefs = {};
3206
3207 // Note that this could be folded into the above `MemRefs` member if doing so
3208 // is advantageous at some point. We don't need to store this in most cases.
3209 // However, at the moment this doesn't appear to make the allocation any
3210 // smaller and makes the code somewhat simpler to read.
3211 int NumMemRefs = 0;
3212
3213public:
3214 using mmo_iterator = ArrayRef<MachineMemOperand *>::const_iterator;
3215
3216 ArrayRef<MachineMemOperand *> memoperands() const {
3217 // Special case the common cases.
3218 if (NumMemRefs == 0)
3219 return {};
3220 if (NumMemRefs == 1)
3221 return ArrayRef(MemRefs.getAddrOfPtr1(), 1);
3222
3223 // Otherwise we have an actual array.
3224 return ArrayRef(cast<MachineMemOperand **>(MemRefs), NumMemRefs);
3225 }
3226 mmo_iterator memoperands_begin() const { return memoperands().begin(); }
3227 mmo_iterator memoperands_end() const { return memoperands().end(); }
3228 bool memoperands_empty() const { return memoperands().empty(); }
3229
3230 /// Clear out the memory reference descriptor list.
3231 void clearMemRefs() {
3232 MemRefs = nullptr;
3233 NumMemRefs = 0;
3234 }
3235
3236 static bool classof(const SDNode *N) {
3237 return N->isMachineOpcode();
3238 }
3239};
3240
3241/// An SDNode that records if a register contains a value that is guaranteed to
3242/// be aligned accordingly.
3243class AssertAlignSDNode : public SDNode {
3244 Align Alignment;
3245
3246public:
3247 AssertAlignSDNode(unsigned Order, const DebugLoc &DL, SDVTList VTs, Align A)
3248 : SDNode(ISD::AssertAlign, Order, DL, VTs), Alignment(A) {}
3249
3250 Align getAlign() const { return Alignment; }
3251
3252 static bool classof(const SDNode *N) {
3253 return N->getOpcode() == ISD::AssertAlign;
3254 }
3255};
3256
3257class SDNodeIterator {
3258 const SDNode *Node;
3259 unsigned Operand;
3260
3261 SDNodeIterator(const SDNode *N, unsigned Op) : Node(N), Operand(Op) {}
3262
3263public:
3264 using iterator_category = std::forward_iterator_tag;
3265 using value_type = SDNode;
3266 using difference_type = std::ptrdiff_t;
3267 using pointer = value_type *;
3268 using reference = value_type &;
3269
3270 bool operator==(const SDNodeIterator& x) const {
3271 return Operand == x.Operand;
3272 }
3273 bool operator!=(const SDNodeIterator& x) const { return !operator==(x); }
3274
3275 pointer operator*() const {
3276 return Node->getOperand(Operand).getNode();
3277 }
3278 pointer operator->() const { return operator*(); }
3279
3280 SDNodeIterator& operator++() { // Preincrement
3281 ++Operand;
3282 return *this;
3283 }
3284 SDNodeIterator operator++(int) { // Postincrement
3285 SDNodeIterator tmp = *this; ++*this; return tmp;
3286 }
3287 size_t operator-(SDNodeIterator Other) const {
3288 assert(Node == Other.Node &&
3289 "Cannot compare iterators of two different nodes!");
3290 return Operand - Other.Operand;
3291 }
3292
3293 static SDNodeIterator begin(const SDNode *N) { return SDNodeIterator(N, 0); }
3294 static SDNodeIterator end (const SDNode *N) {
3295 return SDNodeIterator(N, N->getNumOperands());
3296 }
3297
3298 unsigned getOperand() const { return Operand; }
3299 const SDNode *getNode() const { return Node; }
3300};
3301
3302template <> struct GraphTraits<SDNode*> {
3303 using NodeRef = SDNode *;
3304 using ChildIteratorType = SDNodeIterator;
3305
3306 static NodeRef getEntryNode(SDNode *N) { return N; }
3307
3308 static ChildIteratorType child_begin(NodeRef N) {
3309 return SDNodeIterator::begin(N);
3310 }
3311
3312 static ChildIteratorType child_end(NodeRef N) {
3313 return SDNodeIterator::end(N);
3314 }
3315};
3316
3317/// A representation of the largest SDNode, for use in sizeof().
3318///
3319/// This needs to be a union because the largest node differs on 32 bit systems
3320/// with 4 and 8 byte pointer alignment, respectively.
3321using LargestSDNode = AlignedCharArrayUnion<AtomicSDNode, TargetIndexSDNode,
3322 BlockAddressSDNode,
3323 GlobalAddressSDNode,
3324 PseudoProbeSDNode>;
3325
3326/// The SDNode class with the greatest alignment requirement.
3327using MostAlignedSDNode = GlobalAddressSDNode;
3328
3329namespace ISD {
3330
3331 /// Returns true if the specified node is a non-extending and unindexed load.
3332 inline bool isNormalLoad(const SDNode *N) {
3333 auto *Ld = dyn_cast<LoadSDNode>(N);
3334 return Ld && Ld->getExtensionType() == ISD::NON_EXTLOAD &&
3335 Ld->getAddressingMode() == ISD::UNINDEXED;
3336 }
3337
3338 /// Returns true if the specified node is a non-extending load.
3339 inline bool isNON_EXTLoad(const SDNode *N) {
3340 auto *Ld = dyn_cast<LoadSDNode>(N);
3341 return Ld && Ld->getExtensionType() == ISD::NON_EXTLOAD;
3342 }
3343
3344 /// Returns true if the specified node is a EXTLOAD.
3345 inline bool isEXTLoad(const SDNode *N) {
3346 auto *Ld = dyn_cast<LoadSDNode>(N);
3347 return Ld && Ld->getExtensionType() == ISD::EXTLOAD;
3348 }
3349
3350 /// Returns true if the specified node is a SEXTLOAD.
3351 inline bool isSEXTLoad(const SDNode *N) {
3352 auto *Ld = dyn_cast<LoadSDNode>(N);
3353 return Ld && Ld->getExtensionType() == ISD::SEXTLOAD;
3354 }
3355
3356 /// Returns true if the specified node is a ZEXTLOAD.
3357 inline bool isZEXTLoad(const SDNode *N) {
3358 auto *Ld = dyn_cast<LoadSDNode>(N);
3359 return Ld && Ld->getExtensionType() == ISD::ZEXTLOAD;
3360 }
3361
3362 /// Returns true if the specified node is an unindexed load.
3363 inline bool isUNINDEXEDLoad(const SDNode *N) {
3364 auto *Ld = dyn_cast<LoadSDNode>(N);
3365 return Ld && Ld->getAddressingMode() == ISD::UNINDEXED;
3366 }
3367
3368 /// Returns true if the specified node is a non-truncating
3369 /// and unindexed store.
3370 inline bool isNormalStore(const SDNode *N) {
3371 auto *St = dyn_cast<StoreSDNode>(N);
3372 return St && !St->isTruncatingStore() &&
3373 St->getAddressingMode() == ISD::UNINDEXED;
3374 }
3375
3376 /// Returns true if the specified node is an unindexed store.
3377 inline bool isUNINDEXEDStore(const SDNode *N) {
3378 auto *St = dyn_cast<StoreSDNode>(N);
3379 return St && St->getAddressingMode() == ISD::UNINDEXED;
3380 }
3381
3382 /// Returns true if the specified node is a non-extending and unindexed
3383 /// masked load.
3384 inline bool isNormalMaskedLoad(const SDNode *N) {
3385 auto *Ld = dyn_cast<MaskedLoadSDNode>(N);
3386 return Ld && Ld->getExtensionType() == ISD::NON_EXTLOAD &&
3387 Ld->getAddressingMode() == ISD::UNINDEXED;
3388 }
3389
3390 /// Returns true if the specified node is a non-extending and unindexed
3391 /// masked store.
3392 inline bool isNormalMaskedStore(const SDNode *N) {
3393 auto *St = dyn_cast<MaskedStoreSDNode>(N);
3394 return St && !St->isTruncatingStore() &&
3395 St->getAddressingMode() == ISD::UNINDEXED;
3396 }
3397
3398 /// Attempt to match a unary predicate against a scalar/splat constant or
3399 /// every element of a constant BUILD_VECTOR.
3400 /// If AllowUndef is true, then UNDEF elements will pass nullptr to Match.
3401 template <typename ConstNodeType>
3402 bool matchUnaryPredicateImpl(SDValue Op,
3403 std::function<bool(ConstNodeType *)> Match,
3404 bool AllowUndefs = false,
3405 bool AllowTruncation = false);
3406
3407 /// Hook for matching ConstantSDNode predicate
3408 inline bool matchUnaryPredicate(SDValue Op,
3409 std::function<bool(ConstantSDNode *)> Match,
3410 bool AllowUndefs = false,
3411 bool AllowTruncation = false) {
3412 return matchUnaryPredicateImpl<ConstantSDNode>(Op, Match, AllowUndefs,
3413 AllowTruncation);
3414 }
3415
3416 /// Hook for matching ConstantFPSDNode predicate
3417 inline bool
3418 matchUnaryFpPredicate(SDValue Op,
3419 std::function<bool(ConstantFPSDNode *)> Match,
3420 bool AllowUndefs = false) {
3421 return matchUnaryPredicateImpl<ConstantFPSDNode>(Op, Match, AllowUndefs);
3422 }
3423
3424 /// Attempt to match a binary predicate against a pair of scalar/splat
3425 /// constants or every element of a pair of constant BUILD_VECTORs.
3426 /// If AllowUndef is true, then UNDEF elements will pass nullptr to Match.
3427 /// If AllowTypeMismatch is true then RetType + ArgTypes don't need to match.
3428 LLVM_ABI bool matchBinaryPredicate(
3429 SDValue LHS, SDValue RHS,
3430 std::function<bool(ConstantSDNode *, ConstantSDNode *)> Match,
3431 bool AllowUndefs = false, bool AllowTypeMismatch = false);
3432
3433 /// Returns true if the specified value is the overflow result from one
3434 /// of the overflow intrinsic nodes.
3435 inline bool isOverflowIntrOpRes(SDValue Op) {
3436 unsigned Opc = Op.getOpcode();
3437 return (Op.getResNo() == 1 &&
3438 (Opc == ISD::SADDO || Opc == ISD::UADDO || Opc == ISD::SSUBO ||
3439 Opc == ISD::USUBO || Opc == ISD::SMULO || Opc == ISD::UMULO));
3440 }
3441
3442} // end namespace ISD
3443
3444} // end namespace llvm
3445
